stocks.nameEn: The Chugoku Electric Power Co., Inc.

headlines.title: Japanese Yen Returns To 1986 At Worst Possible Moment
Honda Stock And Other Japan Shares Facing A Falling Yen
Yen at 40-year low: What's driving its historic slump, and can Tokyo stop it?
Japan Looks To Step In As Yen Hits 40 Year Low
Yen Falls to 40-Year Low Versus Dollar, Traders Alert for Potential FX Intervention
Japan 10Y Yield Gains as Yen Hits 40-Year Low
Japan keeps intervention rhetoric unchanged despite yen's slide to 40-year low

marketTone.ko: 엔화 가치가 달러 대비 40년 만에 최저 수준으로 하락하며 시장의 우려가 커지고 있습니다. 1986년 수준까지 떨어진 엔화 약세는 혼다 등 일본 증시에 부담으로 작용하고 있으며, 일본 10년물 국채 금리 상승에도 영향을 미쳤습니다. 시장 참가자들은 일본 당국의 외환시장 개입 가능성에 촉각을 곤두세우고 있으나, 엔화의 지속적인 하락에도 불구하고 개입 관련 발언은 현재까지 변화가 없는 상황입니다.
marketTone.en: The Japanese yen has fallen to a 40-year low against the dollar, reaching levels last seen in 1986 and prompting significant market concern. This historic slump is impacting Japanese equities, with shares like Honda facing pressure, and has also led to gains in Japan's 10-year bond yields. Traders are on high alert for potential foreign exchange intervention by Tokyo, though Japan's intervention rhetoric remains unchanged despite the yen's continued slide.
